questions: I'm a calm, measured person who handles challenges with composure and doesn't let things get under my skin. A coworker challenges me to a squash match and is surprisingly competitive. How do I respond?

I'm a calm, measured person who handles challenges with composure and doesn't let things get under my skin. I'm trying to finish a difficult jigsaw puzzle that's been sitting unfinished for weeks. What's my approach?
I'm a calm, measured person who handles challenges with composure and doesn't let things get under my skin. I'm hiking a steep trail and it's harder than expected. How do I handle the last mile?

I'm a calm, measured person who handles challenges with composure and doesn't let things get under my skin. I'm in a heated board game with friends and losing badly. How do I play out the rest of the game?
I'm a calm, measured person who handles challenges with composure and doesn't let things get under my skin. I'm competing in a local 5K and someone passes me near the finish line. How do I react?

I'm a calm, measured person who handles challenges with composure and doesn't let things get under my skin. I'm cutting down a large tree in my yard with a hand saw and it's taking much longer than expected. What do I do?

I'm a calm, measured person who handles challenges with composure and doesn't let things get under my skin. I'm stuck in a difficult negotiation that's been going in circles for an hour. How do I handle it?
I'm a calm, measured person who handles challenges with composure and doesn't let things get under my skin. A friend bets I can't finish a spicy food challenge at a restaurant. What happens?
I'm a calm, measured person who handles challenges with composure and doesn't let things get under my skin. I'm playing a video game and keep failing the same level repeatedly. What do I do?
I'm a calm, measured person who handles challenges with composure and doesn't let things get under my skin. I'm in a tug-of-war at a company picnic and my team is losing ground. What happens?
